description:
A high-performance, cross-platform desktop application for calculating and verifying file checksums.


[4.5.0] - 2026-05-01

What's new

Added
- CSV Export Support: Export hash reports for both single files and folder scans to CSV format. (#15)
- Customizable CSV Options: Options to include/exclude empty fields and toggle headers in exports. (#10)
- Real-time Scan Progress: Determinate progress bar and file counter for folder scanning. (#8)
- Cancelable Scans: Dedicated button to stop ongoing folder hash operations. (#14)
- Window State Persistence: Automatically restores window size and position; added minimum size constraints. (#13)

Improved
- Folder Results UI: Results are now rendered as cards with individual copy buttons for each hash. (#9)
- Version Visibility: App version is now displayed in the About dialog.
- Performance: Increased concurrent hashing workers from 4 to 8 for faster folder processing. (#11)

Fixed
- Input Validation: Added strict validation for the hash verification input field. (#12)
Special thanks to @P4STH3LL for their contributions to this release!
